macro.title: Amazon launches GLP-1 weight loss program, promising 'fast, convenient' access - CNBC

macro.title: Michael and Susan Dell to donate $750 million to UT Austin to fund new medical campus - CNBC
macro.summary: The donation will create a new hospital at the school where Michael Dell was once a premed student.
